step_rationale: Causal metabolite in coronary atherosclerosis; lipid-core lesion substrate.
mechanism: Sterol ester (27:1/18:2) is a causal metabolite in coronary atherosclerosis, enriched in atherosclerotic lipid cores and driving lesion progression.

references.title: Lipidomics-based investigation of its impact on the pathogenesis of coronary atherosclerosis: a Mendelian randomization study.
